title: MPS State Preparation
description: Matrix Product State based quantum state preparation. It converts a target state vector into an MPS representation and emits a circuit that prepares the target state.

params.help: Psi is the target quantum state vector. It must be a non-zero one-dimensional vector with length less than or equal to 2**target_qubits; shorter vectors are padded with zeros.
params.name: Psi
params.info: 请输入非零一维态向量，长度不超过 2^target_qubits（如 [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0]）

params.help: Number of target qubits used to prepare Psi. The Hilbert-space dimension is 2**target_qubits.
params.name: target_qubits
params.info: 请输入正整数，且 2^target_qubits 不小于 Psi 的长度

params.help: Allowed state-preparation error tolerance. It must be positive.
params.name: target_error
params.info: 请输入正数误差阈值（如 1e-9）
